case_title: WALKER CHARLES ANTIQUES INC. VS MARE DAVID IND. AND DBA JACKSON SQUARE ANTIQUAIRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY WALKER CHARLES ANTIQUES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARE DAVID IND. AND DBA JACKSON SQUARE ANTIQUAIRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER CHARLES ANTIQUES INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARE DAVID IND. AND DBA JACKSON SQUARE ANTIQUAIRES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
